history.en: Developed in Canada in 2003, the Bernedoodle is a recent designer crossbreed created by crossing Bernese Mountain Dogs with Standard Poodles to combine the calm, loyal nature of the Bernese Mountain Dog with the high intelligence and low-shedding coat of the Poodle
history.zh: 2003年在加拿大培育，伯恩山犬是最近的设计师混种犬，通过杂交伯恩山犬和标准贵宾犬培育而成，旨在结合伯恩山犬的冷静、忠诚性格与贵宾犬的高智商和低脱毛被毛。

overview.en: The Bernedoodle is a charming designer crossbreed that first appeared in Canada in 2003, resulting from a cross between the Bernese Mountain Dog and the Standard Poodle. This breed inherits the calm, gentle, and loyal nature of the Bernese Mountain Dog, combined with the high intelligence and low-shedding coat of the Poodle. Bernedoodles are known for being affectionate, playful, and exceptionally friendly, making them wonderful family companions. They are highly intelligent and eager to please, which contributes to their trainability. Their temperament is generally stable and gentle, though they can be sensitive to harsh treatment. Bernedoodles come in various sizes depending on the Poodle parent, but all share a loving disposition and a strong desire to be with their human family. They thrive on companionship and can develop separation anxiety if left alone too often. Overall, the Bernedoodle is a delightful, adaptable, and loving dog suitable for many types of homes.
overview.zh: 伯恩贵宾犬是一种迷人的设计混种犬，于2003年首次在加拿大出现，由伯恩山犬与标准贵宾犬杂交而成。这种犬继承了伯恩山犬冷静、温和、忠诚的天性，同时结合了贵宾犬的高智商和不易掉毛的毛发特点。伯恩贵宾犬以感情丰富、爱玩且极其友善而闻名，是理想的家庭伴侣。它们非常聪明，乐于取悦主人，因此训练起来较为容易。其性情通常稳定温和，但对粗暴对待较为敏感。根据贵宾犬亲本的不同，伯恩贵宾犬有多种体型，但所有个体都拥有充满爱意的性格和强烈的陪伴人类家庭的愿望。它们非常需要陪伴，如果经常独处，可能会产生分离焦虑。总体而言，伯恩贵宾犬是一种令人愉悦、适应性强且充满爱心的犬种，适合多种类型的家庭。

care.en: Daily care for a Bernedoodle involves a consistent routine to keep them healthy and happy. Grooming is a major commitment: their curly or wavy coat requires brushing at least 3–4 times per week to prevent matting, and professional grooming every 6–8 weeks is recommended. Regular ear cleaning and nail trimming are also essential. Exercise needs are moderate to high; they require at least 45–60 minutes of daily activity, including walks, playtime, and mental stimulation like puzzle toys. Without enough exercise, they may become bored and destructive. Veterinary visits should occur at least once a year for check-ups and vaccinations, with more frequent visits as they age. Dental care, including regular teeth brushing, is important to prevent dental disease. Bernedoodles are generally healthy but can be prone to hip dysplasia, eye issues, and allergies, so preventive care and early detection are key. Always provide fresh water and a clean living environment.
care.zh: 伯恩贵宾犬的日常护理需要一套固定的流程来保持其健康和快乐。美容是一项重要投入：它们的卷曲或波浪状毛发每周至少需要梳理3-4次，以防止打结，并建议每6-8周进行一次专业美容。定期清洁耳朵和修剪指甲也必不可少。运动需求为中等到高，每天需要至少45-60分钟的活动，包括散步、玩耍以及益智玩具等精神刺激。如果运动不足，它们可能会变得无聊并产生破坏行为。兽医检查应至少每年一次，进行体检和疫苗接种，随着年龄增长需增加频率。牙齿护理（包括定期刷牙）对于预防牙病非常重要。伯恩贵宾犬总体健康，但可能易患髋关节发育不良、眼部问题和过敏，因此预防护理和早期发现至关重要。始终提供新鲜饮水和清洁的生活环境。

training.en: Training a Bernedoodle is generally a rewarding experience due to their high intelligence and eagerness to please. They respond best to positive reinforcement methods, such as treats, praise, and play, rather than harsh corrections. Start training early, including basic commands like sit, stay, come, and leash manners. Socialization from puppyhood is crucial: expose them to various people, dogs, environments, and sounds to develop a well-rounded, confident adult. Bernedoodles can be sensitive, so a calm and patient approach works best. Consistency in rules and routines helps them understand expectations. They excel in obedience and can learn advanced tricks or dog sports like agility. Mental stimulation is as important as physical exercise; incorporate puzzle toys and training games into their daily routine. Avoid repetitive drills; keep sessions short and fun. With proper training, Bernedoodles become well-mannered, reliable companions.
training.zh: 训练伯恩贵宾犬通常是一种令人愉快的体验，因为它们非常聪明且乐于取悦主人。它们对正面强化方法（如零食、表扬和玩耍）反应最佳，而非严厉的纠正。尽早开始训练，包括基本指令如坐下、等待、过来以及牵绳礼仪。从小进行社会化至关重要：让它们接触不同的人、狗、环境和声音，以培养全面、自信的成年犬。伯恩贵宾犬可能较为敏感，因此冷静耐心的方式最为有效。规则和日常习惯的一致性有助于它们理解期望。它们在服从性方面表现出色，可以学习高级技巧或敏捷性等犬类运动。精神刺激与身体锻炼同样重要；将益智玩具和训练游戏融入日常生活。避免重复枯燥的训练，保持课程简短有趣。通过恰当的训练，伯恩贵宾犬将成为举止得体、值得信赖的伴侣。

diet.en: Feeding a Bernedoodle requires a balanced, high-quality diet tailored to their size, age, and activity level. Choose a dog food formulated for medium to large breeds, with real meat as the first ingredient and appropriate levels of protein and fat. Portion control is important to prevent obesity, which can exacerbate joint issues common in this breed. Typically, an adult Bernedoodle eats 2–3 cups of dry food per day, divided into two meals. Puppies need three to four smaller meals daily. Include omega-3 and omega-6 fatty acids for skin and coat health, and glucosamine for joint support. Avoid foods with fillers like corn, soy, or artificial additives. Fresh vegetables and fruits can be healthy treats in moderation, but never feed grapes, raisins, onions, garlic, or chocolate. Always ensure fresh water is available. Consult your veterinarian for specific dietary recommendations, especially if your dog has allergies or sensitivities.
diet.zh: 喂养伯恩贵宾犬需要根据其体型、年龄和活动水平提供均衡、高质量的饮食。选择专为中型至大型犬配制的狗粮，以真肉为首要成分，并含有适量的蛋白质和脂肪。控制食量以防止肥胖至关重要，因为肥胖会加剧该犬种常见的关节问题。通常，成年伯恩贵宾犬每天分两餐食用2-3杯干粮。幼犬需要每天三到四顿小餐。饮食中应包含欧米伽-3和欧米伽-6脂肪酸以维护皮肤和毛发健康，以及葡萄糖胺来支持关节。避免含有玉米、大豆或人工添加剂等填充物的食物。新鲜蔬菜和水果可作为健康零食适量喂食，但切勿喂葡萄、葡萄干、洋葱、大蒜或巧克力。始终确保提供新鲜饮水。请咨询兽医获取具体的饮食建议，尤其当您的狗有过敏或敏感问题时。

livingTips.en: Bernedoodles are highly adaptable and can thrive in various living environments, from apartments to houses with yards, provided they get enough exercise. They are not well-suited for homes where they are left alone for long hours, as they crave human companionship and may develop separation anxiety. A securely fenced yard is ideal for safe play and exploration. They are generally excellent with children, being gentle, patient, and playful, making them wonderful family dogs. Their friendly nature also extends to other dogs and pets when properly socialized. Bernedoodles are moderate shedders (some are low-shedding) and produce less dander, which can be better for allergy sufferers, though no dog is completely hypoallergenic. They do best in moderate climates, as their thick coat can be uncomfortable in extreme heat. Provide a comfortable indoor space with a bed, toys, and access to fresh water. Regular mental stimulation and family interaction are key to their happiness.
livingTips.zh: 伯恩贵宾犬适应性很强，只要得到足够的运动，无论是公寓还是带院子的房屋，它们都能很好地生活。它们不适合长时间独处的家庭，因为渴望人类陪伴，可能会产生分离焦虑。一个安全围起来的院子是理想的安全玩耍和探索空间。它们通常与孩子相处极好，温柔、耐心且爱玩，是绝佳的家庭犬。如果经过适当的社会化，它们友善的天性也会延伸到其他狗和宠物身上。伯恩贵宾犬掉毛量中等（有些几乎不掉毛），产生的皮屑较少，对过敏者可能更友好，但没有狗是完全低过敏性的。它们最适合温和的气候，因为厚实的毛发在极端高温下会不舒服。提供舒适的室内空间，包括狗床、玩具和新鲜饮水。定期的精神刺激和家庭互动是它们快乐的关键。
